# zstack_container_management_endpoint (Resource)

This resource allows you to manage container management endpoints in ZStack.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `container_access_key_id` (String, Sensitive) The container access key ID (write-only).
- `container_access_key_secret` (String, Sensitive) The container access key secret (write-only).
- `management_ip` (String) The management IP address of the container management endpoint.
- `management_port` (Number) The management port of the container management endpoint.
- `name` (String) The name of the container management endpoint.
- `vendor` (String) The vendor of the container management endpoint.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description for the container management endpoint.

### Read-Only

- `access_key_id` (String) The access key ID (read-only, from API response).
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the container management endpoint.
